rules.extracted_rule: When classifying a claim using the taxonomy, select only a single best-matching option from the provided taxonomy for each required field (e.g., primary/secondary/tertiary cause). Do not invent, combine, or choose “other”; if multiple options seem possible, pick the closest match.
rules.applies_to: Applies to all taxonomy-based classification decisions where multiple candidates could fit and a single best option must be chosen.

original.tertiary_cause: Manufacturing Defect (replacement gear installed ~6 months prior, per engineer attribution)
